name: Silent Push
description: This connector integrates with the Silent Push system to gain insights into domain/IP information, reputations, enrichment, and infratag related details. It also provides functionality to live-scan URLs and take screenshots of them. Additionally, it allows fetching future attack feeds from the Silent Push system

actions.name: List Domain Information
actions.description: Get domain information along with Silent Push risk score and live whois information for multiple domains

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: Get information for these domains(comma-separated)

parameters.name: fetch_risk_score
parameters.description: Fetch the Silent Push risk score for domains

parameters.name: fetch_whois_info
parameters.description: Fetch the live whois information for domains

actions.name: Get Domain Certificates
actions.description: Get certificate data collected from domain scanning

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Domain name - wildcards (*) are supported

parameters.name: domain_regex
parameters.description: A RE2 regular expression pattern to match domains. Overrides the domain parameter

parameters.name: certificate_issuer
parameters.description: The name of the certificate issuer. Wildcards (*) are supported

parameters.name: date_min
parameters.description: Filters certificates issued on or after the specified date (yyyy-mm-dd format)

parameters.name: date_max
parameters.description: Filters certificates issued on or before the specified date (yyyy-mm-dd format)

parameters.name: prefer
parameters.description: Prefer to wait for results for longer running queries or to return job_id immediately (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: max_wait
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait for results before returning a job_id, with a range from 0 to 25 seconds (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: with_metadata
parameters.description: Includes a metadata object in the response, containing returned results, total results, and job_id

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: Search Domains
actions.description: Search for domains with optional filters

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Name or wildcard pattern of domain names to search for

parameters.name: domain_regex
parameters.description: A valid re2 regular expression to match domains to be searched. This parameter overrides the domain parameter

parameters.name: name_server
parameters.description: Name server name or wildcard pattern of name server used by domains

parameters.name: asnum
parameters.description: AS number to filter domains

parameters.name: asname
parameters.description: Search all AS numbers where the AS Name begins with 'as name'

parameters.name: min_ip_diversity
parameters.description: Filter records according to minimum ip diversity limit

parameters.name: registrar
parameters.description: Name or partial name of registrar used to register domains - no wildcards, the given string is used in partial match - this is a slow search option and should only be used in combination with the domain match option

parameters.name: min_asn_diversity
parameters.description: Filter records according to minimum asn diversity limit

parameters.name: certificate_issuer
parameters.description: Filter applied to get domains that have had ssl certificates issued using the named certificate issuer - wildcards are supported

parameters.name: whois_date_after
parameters.description: Filter domains that have a whois created date after this date (yyyy-mm-dd format)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: List Domain Infratags
actions.description: Get infratags for multiple domains with optional clustering

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: List of domains(comma-separated)

parameters.name: match
parameters.description: To configure self-hosted infrastructure: Choose 'full' to tag them with the domain name or 'self' to label NS and MX records (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Whether to build infratag from live lookup data or from previously collected PADNS data (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: as_of
parameters.description: Specifies the timestamp for fetching infratags based on PADNS data. Please note: The value of the `mode` parameter will be ignored, defaulting to 'PADNS'

parameters.name: clusters
parameters.description: Whether to build clusters of domains based on tag similarity

actions.name: Get Enrichment Data
actions.description: Retrieve comprehensive enrichment information for a given resource (domain, IPv4, or IPv6)

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: Type of resource for which information needs to be retrieved

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value corresponding to the selected 'resource' for which information needs to be retrieved

parameters.name: explain
parameters.description: Show the information used to calculate the reputation score

parameters.name: scan_data
parameters.description: Whether to show details of data collected from host, ipv4 or ipv6 scanning based on the input of `resource` parameter

actions.name: List Ip Information
actions.description: Get IP information for multiple IPv4s and IPv6s

parameters.name: ips
parameters.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to fetch information of IPs(comma-separated)

actions.name: Get Asn Reputation
actions.description: Retrieve the reputation information for an Autonomous System Number (ASN)

parameters.name: asn
parameters.description: ASN number for which information needs to be retrieve

parameters.name: explain
parameters.description: Show the information used to calculate the reputation score

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of reputation history to retrieve (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: Get Asn Takedown Reputation
actions.description: Retrieve the takedown reputation information for an Autonomous System Number (ASN)

parameters.name: asn
parameters.description: ASN number for which information needs to be retrieve

parameters.name: explain
parameters.description: Show the information used to calculate the reputation score

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of reputation history to retrieve (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: Get Ipv4 Reputation
actions.description: Retrieve the reputation information for an IPv4

parameters.name: ipv4
parameters.description: IPv4 address for which information needs to be retrieve

parameters.name: explain
parameters.description: Show the information used to calculate the reputation score

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of reputation history to retrieve (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: Get Job Status
actions.description: Retrieve status of running job or results from completed job

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: ID of the job returned by Silent Push actions

parameters.name: max_wait
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait for results before returning a job_id, with a range from 0 to 25 seconds (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: result_type
parameters.description: Type of result to include in the response

actions.name: Get Nameserver Reputation
actions.description: Retrieve the reputation information for an nameserver

parameters.name: nameserver
parameters.description: Nameserver name for which information needs to be retrieve

parameters.name: explain
parameters.description: Show the information used to calculate the reputation score

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of reputation history to retrieve (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: Get Subnet Reputation
actions.description: Retrieve the reputation information for subnet

parameters.name: subnet
parameters.description: IPv4 subnet for which information needs to be retrieved. For example, 192.1.0.0/24

parameters.name: explain
parameters.description: Show the information used to calculate the reputation score

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of reputation history to retrieve (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: Get Asns Seen For Domain
actions.description: Retrieve the takedown reputation information for an Autonomous System Number (ASN)

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Name of domain to search asns for

actions.name: Forward Padns Lookup
actions.description: Forward PADNS lookup

parameters.name: qtype
parameters.description: Type of DNS record

parameters.name: qname
parameters.description: The DNS record name to lookup, wildcards are supported in name string

parameters.name: netmask
parameters.description: The netmask may be given for DNS record types ptr4 and ptr6

parameters.name: subdomains
parameters.description: Whether to include or exclude subdomains from DNS record type a or aaaa

parameters.name: regex
parameters.description: Regular expression match for domain/host. It overrides DNS record name parameter and it must be valid re2 regular expression

parameters.name: match
parameters.description: Whether to limit results to self-hosted infrastructure for qtype MX or NS - strict or find all matching results - self; this only show results where MX or NS records are in the same domain as qname (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: first_seen_after
parameters.description: The first_seen timestamp must be on or after this time

parameters.name: first_seen_before
parameters.description: The first_seen timestamp must be on or before this time

parameters.name: last_seen_after
parameters.description: The last_seen timestamp must be on or after this time

parameters.name: last_seen_before
parameters.description: The last_seen timestamp must be on or before this time

parameters.name: as_of
parameters.description: Return results where the as_of timestamp equivalent is between the first_seen and the last_seen timestamp of record

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return results in specified order(asc or desc) according to columns: column/order (comma-separated)

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Whether to use Silent Push padns output format or cof (common output format) (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: prefer
parameters.description: Prefer to wait for results for longer running queries or to return job_id immediately (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: with_metadata
parameters.description: Includes a metadata object in the response, containing returned results, total results, and job_id

parameters.name: max_wait
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait for results before returning a job_id, with a range from 0 to 25 seconds (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: Reverse Padns Lookup
actions.description: Reverse PADNS lookup

parameters.name: qtype
parameters.description: Type of DNS record

parameters.name: qname
parameters.description: The DNS record name to lookup, wildcards are supported in name string

parameters.name: netmask
parameters.description: The netmask may be given for DNS record types ptr4 and ptr6

parameters.name: subdomains
parameters.description: Whether to include or exclude subdomains from DNS record type a or aaaa

parameters.name: regex
parameters.description: Regular expression match for domain/host. It overrides DNS record name parameter and it must be valid re2 regular expression

parameters.name: first_seen_after
parameters.description: The first_seen timestamp must be on or after this time

parameters.name: first_seen_before
parameters.description: The first_seen timestamp must be on or before this time

parameters.name: last_seen_after
parameters.description: The last_seen timestamp must be on or after this time

parameters.name: last_seen_before
parameters.description: The last_seen timestamp must be on or before this time

parameters.name: as_of
parameters.description: Return results where the as_of timestamp equivalent is between the first_seen and the last_seen timestamp of record

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Return results in specified order(asc or desc) according to columns: column/order (comma-separated)

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Whether to use Silent Push padns output format or cof (common output format) (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: prefer
parameters.description: Prefer to wait for results for longer running queries or to return job_id immediately (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: with_metadata
parameters.description: Includes a metadata object in the response, containing returned results, total results, and job_id

parameters.name: max_wait
parameters.description: Number of seconds to wait for results before returning a job_id, with a range from 0 to 25 seconds (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

actions.name: Density Lookup
actions.description: Get information based on numerous granular DNS/IP parameters

parameters.name: qtype
parameters.description: Query type from one of nssrv, mxsrv, nshash, mxhash, ipv4, ipv6, asn and chv

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Specify a value to lookup, name of NS or MX server, hash of NS or MX server, IPv4 or IPv6 address, AS number

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Retrieve exact/near match results by query type: ipv4: ip-subnet/subnet_ips-asn/asn_subnets, ASN: asn-asn_subnets, nssrv or mxsrv: host-domain-subdomain, chv: chv/chv_analysis

actions.name: Search Scan Data
actions.description: Search the Silent Push scan data repositories

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of results to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return (Defaults to Silent Push API's behaviour)

parameters.name: with_metadata
parameters.description: Includes a metadata object in the response, containing returned results, total results, and job_id

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Query in SPQL syntax to scan data

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Fields to return in the scanned data fetched using query (comma-separated)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort according to fields from the Silent Push supported field names, followed by forward slash (/), and the sort order (asc or desc)(comma-separated)

actions.name: Live Url Scan
actions.description: Scan a URL to get metadata on what it is hosted

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: An URL to scan

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Device to perform scan with (Desktop, Mobile, Crawler)

parameters.name: os
parameters.description: OS to perform scan with (Windows, Linux, MacOS, iOS, Android)

parameters.name: browser
parameters.description: Browser to perform scan with (Firefox, Chrome, Edge, Safari)

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region from where scan should be perform (US, EU, AS, TOR)

actions.name: Get Indicators Of Future Attack Feed
actions.description: Get indicators of future attack feed from the Silent Push platform

parameters.name: feed_uuid
parameters.description: Feed unique id to fetch records for

parameters.name: page_no
parameters.description: Indicates the specific page to fetch (default: 1)

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Determines the number of records per page (default: 10,000)

actions.name: Live Url Screenshot
actions.description: This action generate a screenshot for a URL and store it inside the vault

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Url

actions.name: Get Data Export
actions.description: Get data for Organisation feeds and download as csv file in vault

parameters.name: feed_url
parameters.description: Feed URL
